old.desc:
Discover the viability of Zafina’s moves in s2. 

Token is huge; what moves bring the token?

card.desc:
Discover the viability of Zafina’s moves in s2. 

Token is huge; what moves bring the token? 

What was season 1 Zafina good at? 
- power crush ability in heat 
- simple frame traps and chip damage at the wall
card.name: Zafina lab drills

card.desc:
Discover the viability of Zafina’s moves in s2. 

Token is huge; what moves bring the token?
card.name: Zafina lab drills

card.desc:
Situational drill to create awareness of different options to go for 

Ex: Zafina b1+2 > BD > launch a whiff 
Launch 

Zafina f3 > scr2,1 heat guaranteed or f1+2 

- record a specific barrage of actions that create chip damage 
- end it with a planned whiff sequence and use heat engager
- record a similar barrage but none to little chip and launch
card.name: Advanced whiff drill

card.desc:
- set cpu to block and punish 
- record a jab or fast recovery move and a slow recovery move 
- react to the jab with a jab or df1 punish 
- react to the bigger whiff with a launch
card.name: Whiff drill

card.desc:
- set cpu to block and punish with plus frame to command grab and a 20-22 frame low 
- do a safe move and break grabs block low 
- extra: set CPU to pressure > low > pressure > command grab OR low 

This adds complexity if you miss the low to keep defending after
card.name: Grab/reaction drill

card.desc:
- set cpu to block and punish with 1 jab into grabs/ command grabs 
- do a minus move and mash a jab so you get ch/interrupted by the jab 
- break the throw 
- add in string or low or problem move after jab 
- ex: jab to drag db3+4 or some mid high string
card.name: Advanced reaction drill

card.desc:
Lab:

More QCF4 on ground

B4 good keep out but if whiff, back dash or SS look for B4,3 or whiff
card.name: Drag

card.desc:
Lab:

Lab oB back dash timing > EX: 1+2,4 vs Ling no punish. Lab better options IE: DF1

BDx2:

- DB4
- FF4
- 1+2
- D4 confirm CH launch
card.name: Zafina

card.desc:
Lee PC Oki:

- Dash up wait for kick up etc
- dash D2 float

Lab Lee Low Parry Combo

Lab Neutral + FF2 > EX: Running 3,4 vs Feng Backsway back kenpo

- Lab like df1 etc on hit to backsway

lab quick chexking moves ie: feng df3 ob

cards.name: Zafina lab drills

checkItems.name: wall wake up SS4 and the wall splat slap ss1+2
Opt for 1+2 over B4 up close in timing/footsie battles
B4 CH near wall > D2 > B2F > F2,1 > WS! > DF1 > F4,1 > T! > 3+4 HMS > U4 > UB3
D3 on hit as floor hit just do FF3 or 1 dash to B4 or 1+2
